name: Eggplant Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare medium charcoal grill.
2. Place eggplant slices on a large tray or baking sheet and sprinkle with coarse salt. Let stand to release moisture for about 20 minutes.
3. Drain, rinse and pat the eggplant slices dry.
4. Sprinkle both sides of the eggplant slices with pepper, basil, parsley, and garlic.
5. Grill over medium coals until the eggplant is wilted but not overcooked, sprinkling with vinegar while cooking.
6. Remove from grill.
7. Blend the sun-dried tomato into goat cheese.
8. Spread some on each eggplant slice.
9. Roll the eggplant in a jelly-roll fashion.
10. Arrange the rolls on a serving tray or platter.
11. Garnish with chopped parsley.
